acceptance_layer: system working — matrix batch (broll + kinetic ASS + voice bank)

style_stack.visual: broll_montage PRIMARY (matrix=static plates+hard cuts; smoke keeps Ken Burns)

beats.speakable_text: If raised shoulders is familiar, this burnout pattern needs a better reset.
Trying to outrun burnout usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.
Burnout often persists because a tired nervous system stops responding to pressure like a performance tool. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.
Try this. Close the loop, lower your jaw. And take three slow double-inhale sighs before choosing the next task. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Rest is a recovery input, not a reward for perfect output.
